brief: China evacuates nearly 2 million as second typhoon hits, while US Senator Lindsey Graham dies at 71 and US-Iran tensions escalate over the Strait of Hormuz.
news_summary: Typhoon landfall in Zhejiang prompts mass evacuations, and Senator Lindsey Graham's sudden death dominates US politics, alongside renewed US-Iran strikes and a Toronto festival shooting.
papers_summary: HCI research spans missing data visualization, AI in crime linkage, BCI clinical trials in China, and sign language recognition via smart gloves.

en.brief: China evacuates nearly 2 million as second typhoon hits, while US Senator Lindsey Graham dies at 71 and US-Iran tensions escalate over the Strait of Hormuz.
en.news_summary: Typhoon landfall in Zhejiang prompts mass evacuations, and Senator Lindsey Graham's sudden death dominates US politics, alongside renewed US-Iran strikes and a Toronto festival shooting.
en.papers_summary: HCI research spans missing data visualization, AI in crime linkage, BCI clinical trials in China, and sign language recognition via smart gloves.

zh.brief: 中国本周遭遇第二个台风登陆，近200万人疏散；台湾也受台风巴威影响，15万户停电。韩国寺院举办静修相亲活动，帮助单身男女寻找爱情。美国参议员林赛·格雷厄姆去世。研究方面，多篇论文关注可视化、犯罪关联分析和智能手套手语识别。
zh.news_summary: 中国浙江因台风疏散近200万人，台湾屏东和兰屿出现14级强风。韩国僧人组织30小时山林静修相亲，帮助单身男女。美国参议员林赛·格雷厄姆病逝。
zh.papers_summary: 今日论文涵盖缺失数据可视化诊断工具ImputeViz、高风险犯罪关联分析中AI的使用、以及基于深度学习的智能手套手语识别等研究。

todays_image.caption: The bristled seeds of Digitaria setigera Roth could be scattered far and wide by the same typhoon winds now battering China.
todays_image.title: Digitaria setigera Roth
